title: ObservationSnapshot
description: The complete typed set of inputs the dispatcher + dev/review wrappers CONSULT to decide a label transition for ONE issue at ONE tick. This is the spec contract: docs/pipeline/observation-snapshot.md cites the file:line that reads each field today, and the (gated/stop-ruled) runtime reconciler would assemble exactly this object before evaluating transitions.json guards. NOT a runtime artifact today — it documents the read surface so the guards in transitions.json are grounded in real inputs. The dispatcher does not literally serialize this object; the schema validates a fixture snapshot assembled from stubbed gh outputs (tests/unit/fixtures/spec-gate/).

labels.description: The issue's current label set, partitioned into the pipeline-meaningful members. Source: gh issue list/view --json labels (lib-dispatch.sh list_* selectors + dispatcher-tick.sh Step-5 membership greps).

active_state.description: At most one active/terminal state label (the state-machine invariant). null when only `autonomous` is present.

dependencies.description: The `## Dependencies` resolution (INV-11). Source: lib-dispatch.sh check_deps_resolved.

resolved.description: true iff every referenced dependency issue/PR is CLOSED or MERGED (INV-11). A new issue is dispatched only when true.

pr.description: The PR linked to the issue (body references #N) and its review-relevant state. Source: lib-dispatch.sh fetch_pr_for_issue / last_reviewed_head; autonomous-review.sh mergeable gate.

state.description: gh pr view --json state. The INV-54 PR-open guard keys on this.

review_decision.description: gh pr view --json reviewDecision (wrapper-owned per INV-52).

mergeable.description: gh pr view --json mergeable. INV-44 mergeable hard gate; UNKNOWN is retried up to MERGEABLE_RETRIES.

ci_state.description: Aggregate of gh pr checks; Step 5a requires all SUCCESS.

reviewed_head.description: The `Reviewed HEAD: <sha>` trailer from the latest review comment (INV-04/07). Step 5b compares head_ref_oid vs this.

session.description: The prior agent session's completion state (INV-12 / INV-35). Source: lib-dispatch.sh is_session_completed + extract_dev_session_id.

completed.description: true iff the prior session reached a terminal reason (end_turn|completed, or prompt_too_long). Drives INV-12 resume-eligibility and INV-35 review-aware routing.

verdict.description: The most recent authentic review verdict (INV-20 actor+window+trailer binding) and its cause. Source: lib-dispatch.sh classify_recent_review_verdict.

cause.description: The non-substantive cause sub-classification, when state is failed-non-substantive.

liveness.description: Wrapper PID liveness (INV-01/18/24/30). CRITICAL: the remote-SSM path is TRI-STATE — alive | dead | indeterminate. `indeterminate` (the SSM query itself failed / timed out) is a distinct THIRD state that biases ALIVE so the dispatcher does not kill a wrapper it cannot see. Source: lib-dispatch.sh pid_alive + liveness-check-remote-aws-ssm.sh.

near_success.description: INV-24: a recent dev/review success signal (merged PR, APPROVED review, recent verdict/session-report comment, live PGID). DEAD requires pid miss AND no near_success AND no fresh heartbeat.

within_grace.description: INV-17/18 cold-start grace: a freshly-dispatched wrapper is never declared DEAD until DISPATCH_GRACE_PERIOD_SECONDS elapses.

retries.description: Retry accounting (INV-05/19). Source: lib-dispatch.sh count_retries + count_review_aware_flips.
